description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the alpine:latest Docker image, defining stages lint, build, and autoupdate, setting GIT_DEPTH to 100, and applying workflow rules that skip pipelines on push when a merge request is open, run on merge request events, and also run on schedule or web triggers. In the lint stage add the following jobs: aport-lint (allow_failure) runs `.ci/lib/gitlab_prepare_ci.sh` then `.ci/apkbuild-lint.sh`; editor-config (image alpine:edge) runs `.ci/lib/gitlab_prepare_ci.sh` then `.ci/ec.sh`; kernel-kconfig runs `.ci/lib/gitlab_prepare_ci.sh` then `.ci/kconfig.sh` when kconfig files change; mr-settings runs before_script `apk upgrade -U` and `apk -q add python3`, then downloads `check_mr_settings.py` with wget and executes `python3 ./check_mr_settings.py`; pytest-commits runs `.ci/lib/gitlab_prepare_ci.sh`, `.ci/pytest.sh`, `.ci/commits.sh` and stores `log.txt`, `log_testsuite_pmaports.txt`, and `pmbootstrap.cfg` as artifacts on failure; ruff runs `.ci/lib/gitlab_prepare_ci.sh` then `.ci/ruff.sh` when .ci files change; shellcheck-grep (image alpine:edge) runs `.ci/lib/gitlab_prepare_ci.sh`, `.ci/shellcheck.sh`, `.ci/grep.sh`, `.ci/codeowners.sh`; and wiki runs `.ci/lib/gitlab_prepare_ci.sh` then `.ci/wiki.sh`, all gated by rules for merge request events or unprotected branches. Define a hidden `.build` template with before_script `apk upgrade -U` and `.ci/lib/gitlab_prepare_ci.sh`, after_script `cp -r /home/pmos/.local/var/pmbootstrap/packages/ packages/ || true`, artifacts preserving the `packages/` directory for one week, a 10‑hour timeout, and extend it in the build stage with jobs build-aarch64, build-armhf, build-armv7, build-riscv64, build-x86, and build-x86_64 each executing their respective `.ci/build-*.sh` script. In the autoupdate stage add an auto-update job that runs before_script `.ci/lib/gitlab_prepare_ci.sh`, after_script `.ci/lib/move_logs.sh $CI_PROJECT_DIR`, script `.ci/autoupdate.sh "$AUTOUPDATE_PACKAGES"`, and on failure archives `log.txt`, `log_testsuite_pmaports.txt`, and `pmbootstrap.cfg` as artifacts, triggering only when `$AUTOUPDATE_PACKAGES` is set and the pipeline source is schedule or web. Apply a global after_script `.ci/lib/move_logs.sh $CI_PROJECT_DIR` and inherit the global before_script `apk upgrade -U` for all jobs unless overridden.
